\tzpentry{ID3478}{Phase Angle Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3478 introduces Phase Angle Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ I_{\text{obs}}(\theta,\phi) \;=\; \int_{S^2} \text{PSF}(\theta',\phi')\,\mathcal{T}(\theta-\theta',\phi-\phi')\,d\Omega' + \text{noise}, \]
